title: Bibliobiomes Legacy
description: Bibliobiomes Legacy is an addon for Bibliocraft Legacy that adds support for wood types from Biomes O' Plenty, Oh The Biomes We've Gone and Regions Unexplored.
body:
Bibliobiomes Legacy is a spiritual successor to the Bibliowoods series of mods, providing modded wood type support to [Bibliocraft Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/bibliocraft-legacy).

Currently supported mods include:

- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)
- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)

Up until version 1.21.1-1.5.0, this mod was a part of [Bibliowoods Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/bibliowoods-legacy). It has since been moved into its own project due to increasing file sizes.

# Support

This mod currently supports NeoForge for 1.21.1 and upwards. There are no current plans to port to Fabric, Forge, Quilt, or any other loader. There are also no plans to backport to versions older than 1.21.1.

If you need help with using the mod, want to request support for a mod, or just want to chat, feel free to join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/jSnHGFBX2k)!
